name_fr: Programme d'aide à la recherche industrielle (PARI)
description_en: IRAP provides financial support and advisory services to Canadian small and medium-sized businesses engaged in technology innovation. Funding helps cover R&D labour and contractor costs.
description_fr: Le PARI offre un soutien financier et des services-conseils aux PME canadiennes engagées dans l'innovation technologique.

eligible_costs_en: Salaries and wages for R&D staff
Equipment directly tied to the R&D project
funding_details.note_en: Funding amounts vary widely based on project scope. Large technology firms may receive multi-million dollar contributions.

eligibility.focus: Technology development or adaptation with commercial potential

irap_advisors.description_en: IRAP Industrial Technology Advisors (ITAs) are assigned to businesses and provide both financial support and strategic advisory services at no cost
